ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "manner_of_death" TEXT /* Manner of death or injury (e.g., shot, Tasered) */,
  "armed" TEXT /* Whether the individual was armed */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Level of threat posed by the individual */,
  "flee" TEXT /* Whether the individual was fleeing */,
  "body_camera" INTEGER /* Whether body camera footage is available */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "use_of_force" TEXT /* Level of force used (e.g., minimal, moderate, severe) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident (e.g., arrest, hospitalization) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the incident was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the incident data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the individual */,
  "next_of_kin" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the next of kin */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions of the individual */,
  "criminal_record" TEXT /* Summary of the individual's criminal record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the individual's record was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the individual's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "is_geocoding_exact" INTEGER /* Whether the geocoding is exact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_individuals" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual involved */,
  "signs_of_mental_illness" INTEGER /* Whether the individual showed signs of mental illness */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual to the incident (e.g., suspect, victim) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location's role in the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location's association was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the location's association data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investigator, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., shooting, Taser deployment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the incident type was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the incident type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., incident report, witness statement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the document was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the document data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an incident */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_versions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., investigator, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user-role association was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user-role association data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
